## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**WC_CALENDAR** -> WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)

**WC_EMP_ATT** -> EMP_WC_TITLES (WC -> WC)

**WC_E_SCHD_ATT** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPL -> EMPLOYEE)

**WC_SUB_DESCR** -> LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCATION -> LOCN); WORKCENTERS (PRIMARY_WC->MACHINE, SUB_WC->MACHINE)

**WC_WG_SCHED** -> JOB_HEADER (SUFFIX->SUFFIX, WO->JOB); JOB_OPERATIONS (SEQ -> SEQ); WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)
